description_long: This sculpture depicts a tender family scene with two adult figures, a man and a woman, kneeling closely together and embracing a small child between them. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed drapery and realistic anatomical features. The man, muscular and shirtless, gently leans over the woman, who cradles the child in her lap. The group is mounted on a round base, which itself sits atop a square wooden plinth. The entire piece rests on a larger, thin wooden platform. The surface of the sculpture is smooth and appears to be made of a pale stone or marble material, contrasting with the darker wood of the plinth. The overall composition conveys warmth, protection, and familial unity.
description: A detailed, classical-style sculpture of a kneeling family group—man, woman, and child—on a round base atop a wooden plinth. The figures are closely embraced, with smooth pale stone contrasting against the dark wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces and full embrace of the man, woman, and child, with the family group clearly visible and central.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the man's muscular back and the draped fabric, with the family group in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both adults, the drapery, and the round base, with little detail of the faces.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the woman's back and the side of the family group, with the man's arm around her shoulders.
attribute_subject_matter: kneeling family group with man, woman, and child
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a wooden platform, suggesting an indoor or protected setting such as a gallery or exhibition space.
